about.title: About Nutsnl
about.intro1: Welcome to Nutsnl, your premier destination for the finest selection of premium nuts from around the world. Since our establishment, we've been committed to bringing you the highest quality nuts, carefully sourced from trusted farms and suppliers globally.
about.intro2: We believe that quality nuts are not just a snack – they're a lifestyle choice that promotes health, wellness, and sustainability. Every nut in our collection is handpicked, ensuring only the best reaches your table.
about.passionDesc: We're passionate about providing the finest nuts with exceptional taste and nutritional value.
about.sustainabilityDesc: Our commitment to sustainable sourcing ensures a better future for our planet.
about.qualityDesc: Every nut is carefully selected and quality-checked to meet our high standards.

blog.title: Nuts & Nutrition Blog
blog.subtitle: Explore articles about health benefits, recipes, storage tips, and everything you need to know about premium nuts.
blog.subscribeDesc: Get the latest articles, recipes, and health tips delivered straight to your inbox. Join our community of nut enthusiasts!
blog.authorBio: {{author}} is a nutrition expert and food storage specialist with over 10 years of experience helping people make the most of their healthy food choices. Passionate about sustainable living and reducing food waste.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our products, shipping, and policies
faq.supportTeamHelp: Our customer support team is here to help!

questions.shippingTimeAnswer: Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days, express shipping takes 2-3 business days, and next-day delivery is available for orders placed before 2 PM. Free standard shipping is available on orders over €50.
questions.internationalAnswer: Yes! We currently ship to Canada, UK, and select European countries. International orders typically take 10-15 business days. Shipping costs vary by destination.
questions.trackOrderAnswer: Absolutely! Once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking number via email. You can use this to monitor your package's journey to your doorstep.
questions.damagedPackage: What if my package is damaged during shipping?
questions.damagedPackageAnswer: If your package arrives damaged, please contact us immediately with photos. We'll send you a replacement at no charge or issue a full refund.
questions.organicAnswer: Yes! All our nuts are sourced from certified organic farms. We never use pesticides or chemicals. Each product page specifies the origin and certifications.
questions.storage: How should I store the nuts?
questions.storageAnswer: Store nuts in an airtight container in a cool, dry place. For extended freshness, you can refrigerate them for up to 6 months or freeze for up to a year.
questions.rawRoasted: Are the nuts raw or roasted?
questions.rawRoastedAnswer: We offer both! Each product is clearly labeled as either raw, roasted, or available in both options. Check the product description for specific details.
questions.saltedUnsalted: Do you offer salted or unsalted varieties?
questions.saltedUnsaltedAnswer: Most of our nuts are available in both salted and unsalted varieties. The product description will specify which version you're ordering.
questions.shelfLife: What is the shelf life of your nuts?
questions.shelfLifeAnswer: When properly stored, our nuts stay fresh for 3-6 months. We recommend checking the 'best by' date on the package and storing them in a cool, dry place.
questions.allergenAnswer: Our facility processes tree nuts and peanuts. If you have severe allergies, please note that cross-contamination is possible. All products are clearly labeled with allergen information.
questions.nutritionalAnswer: Yes! Each product page includes detailed nutritional information including calories, protein, fats, and carbohydrates per serving.
questions.glutenFreeAnswer: All our pure nut products are naturally gluten-free. However, some flavored varieties may contain gluten. Please check individual product labels.
questions.returnPolicyAnswer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied with your purchase, you can return unopened packages for a full refund. Damaged or defective products can be returned even if opened.
questions.initiateReturn: How do I initiate a return?
questions.initiateReturnAnswer: Email us at returns@nutsnl.com with your order number and reason for return. We'll provide you with return instructions and, if applicable, a prepaid shipping label.
questions.refundTime: How long does it take to process a refund?
questions.refundTimeAnswer: Once we receive your return, we'll inspect it within 2-3 business days. Approved refunds are processed within 5-10 business days back to your original payment method.
questions.paymentMethods: What payment methods do you accept?
questions.paymentMethodsAnswer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover), PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay.
questions.bulkDiscountAnswer: Yes! Contact our wholesale team at wholesale@nutsnl.com for bulk pricing on orders over 50 lbs. We offer special pricing for businesses and regular buyers.
questions.hiddenFeesAnswer: No hidden fees! The price you see at checkout is the final price. Shipping costs are clearly displayed before you complete your purchase.
questions.needAccount: Do I need an account to place an order?
questions.needAccountAnswer: No, you can checkout as a guest. However, creating an account allows you to track orders, save addresses, and receive exclusive offers.
questions.contactService: How can I contact customer service?
questions.contactServiceAnswer: You can reach us at support@nutsnl.com, call 1-800-NUTS-NL (1-800-688-7665), or use the contact form on our website. We're available Monday-Friday, 9 AM - 6 PM EST.

shipping.title: Shipping Information
shipping.subtitle: Fast, reliable delivery to bring farm-fresh nuts right to your doorstep
shipping.nextDayDesc: Order before 2 PM for next business day delivery
shipping.domesticDesc: We ship to all 50 states in the USA. Hawaii and Alaska may have extended delivery times.
shipping.internationalDesc: Currently shipping to Canada, UK, and select European countries. International orders may take 10-15 business days.
shipping.freeShippingDesc: Enjoy complimentary standard shipping on all orders above €50. No coupon code needed!
shipping.processingTimeDesc: All orders are processed within 1-2 business days.
shipping.orderConfirmationDesc: You will receive an email confirmation as soon as your order is placed.
shipping.trackingInfoDesc: Once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking number via email.
shipping.weekendOrdersDesc: Orders placed on weekends will be processed on the following Monday.
shipping.packagingDesc: All products are carefully packaged to ensure freshness and prevent damage during transit.
shipping.tempControlDesc: Nuts are shipped in climate-controlled packaging to maintain optimal quality.
shipping.poBoxesDesc: We can ship to P.O. boxes, but express shipping options may not be available.
shipping.holidaysDesc: During peak holiday seasons, delivery times may be extended by 1-2 days.
shipping.contactUsDesc: For any shipping questions, please contact our customer service team.

returns.title: Returns & Refunds
returns.subtitle: Your satisfaction is our priority. We offer a hassle-free 30-day return policy.
returns.guaranteeDesc: Not completely satisfied with your purchase? Return it within 30 days for a full refund. No questions asked!
returns.step1Desc: Email us at returns@nutsnl.com with your order number and reason for return.
returns.step2Desc: Pack the item securely in its original packaging. Include all accessories and documentation.
returns.step3Desc: Ship to our return address. We'll provide a prepaid shipping label for defective items.
returns.eligible2: Damaged or defective products (even if opened)
returns.eligible5: Returns initiated within 30 days of delivery
returns.notEligible3: Sale or clearance items (marked as final sale)
returns.processingTimeDesc: Once we receive your return, we'll inspect it within 2-3 business days.
returns.refundMethodDesc: Refunds will be issued to your original payment method.
returns.refundTimelineDesc: Please allow 5-10 business days for the refund to appear in your account after approval.
returns.partialRefundsDesc: In some cases (e.g., items not in original condition), a partial refund may be issued.
returns.notificationDesc: You'll receive an email confirmation once your refund has been processed.
returns.exchangesDesc: We currently don't offer direct exchanges. If you'd like a different product:
returns.exchange1: Return your original item following the return process above
returns.exchange2: Place a new order for the item you want
returns.exchange3: Once your return is processed, you'll receive a full refund
returns.exchangeNote: This ensures you get the product you want as quickly as possible!
returns.needHelpDesc: If you have any questions about our return policy, please don't hesitate to contact us:
returns.serviceNote: Our customer service team is here to help make your return process as smooth as possible.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Your privacy is important to us. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your information.
privacy.secureDataDesc: We use industry-standard encryption to protect your information
privacy.noSellingDesc: We never sell your personal data to third parties
privacy.yourControlDesc: You can request, modify, or delete your data anytime
privacy.introText1: Welcome to Nutsnl ("we," "our," or "us"). We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy will inform you about how we look after your personal data when you visit our website and tell you about your privacy rights.
privacy.introText2: This privacy policy applies to information we collect when you use our website, mobile application, or interact with us through customer service, social media, or other channels.
